name: football-threejs
description: Low-poly 3D American football prototype built with Three.js.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/playerSimulation.test.ts tests/playState.test.ts tests/driveModel.test.ts tests/scoreAttackModel.test.ts tests/fieldSpec.test.ts tests/fieldGeometry.test.ts tests/ballSpotting.test.ts tests/formationLayout.test.ts tests/formationPreview.test.ts tests/receiverRoutes.test.ts tests/passTargeting.test.ts tests/audioPipeline.test.ts tests/audioRuntime.test.ts tests/gameAudioDirector.test.ts tests/broadcastCommentaryDirector.test.ts tests/gameExperienceSettings.test.ts tests/ballVisual.test.ts tests/routeArtRenderer.test.ts tests/playCallDiagram.test.ts tests/gameplayCameraController.test.ts tests/presentationCameraDirector.test.ts tests/presentationAudit.test.ts tests/presentationHoldDirector.test.ts tests/helmetVisual.test.ts tests/playerVisual.test.ts tests/playerPoseController.test.ts tests/teamSimulation.test.ts tests/playbook.test.ts tests/crowdPreview.test.ts tests/crowdPresentation.test.ts
